There’s a few songs we call our own
That bring out laughter, tears and dreams
A timeless bond, we can’t erase
Songs that lie in the heart of you and I
Us
~forever more
Beyond all time
In those songs, we live, we soar
There is no rhythm anymore
We will never want for anything else

#BluSkyPoetry
